headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall After Nasdaq Hits High; Tesla Stock Sinks On Elon Musk Comments
summary: The Nasdaq hit a new high as techs led Wednesday. Tesla fell late on Elon Musk comments. Lam Research, CSX, Texas Instruments and IBM were big earnings movers overnight.

headline: Why Micron (MU) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of memory chips maker Micron (NASDAQ:MU) jumped 6.2% in the afternoon session after its stock reached an all-time high, driven by surging demand for its specialized memory chips used in artificial intelligence.

headline: SK Hynix Posts 400% Profit Rise. Micron Stock Is Falling.
summary: SK Hynix  reported surging quarterly profit on the back of a memory-chip shortage that could last for years.  SK Hynix gave up initial gains to close up 0.2% in local trading while Micron was down 1.4%.  SK Hynix executives told analysts that demand for high-bandwidth memory—a crucial component for artificial-intelligence chips from the likes of  Nvidia  —outstrips current supply capacity for the next three years.

content.title: SK Hynix Posts 400% Profit Rise. Micron Stock Is Falling.
content.summary: SK Hynix  reported surging quarterly profit on the back of a memory-chip shortage that could last for years.  SK Hynix gave up initial gains to close up 0.2% in local trading while Micron was down 1.4%.  SK Hynix executives told analysts that demand for high-bandwidth memory—a crucial component for artificial-intelligence chips from the likes of  Nvidia  —outstrips current supply capacity for the next three years.

headline: Micron Is Up 68% YTD as HBM Demand Explodes. Is the Memory Rally Sustainable?

MU stock is up 68% year-to-date, making Micron one of the standout names in the AI infrastructure rally. The catalyst is structural. headline: SanDisk Climbs 295% YTD as AI Fuels Memory Mania: Can Q1 Results Justify the Run?
summary: Shares of SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) are trading near $930 in Thursday’s session, down roughly 5% on the day. The pullback cools an extraordinary 295% year-to-date (YTD) rally that has made SNDK one of the hottest AI-exposed names in the technology sector. The current SNDK share price sits almost directly on top of the $928 analyst consensus ... SanDisk Climbs 295% YTD as AI Fuels Memory Mania: Can Q1 Results Justify the Run?
